description: Fix 6 calendar/UI issues: button nesting hydration, AI toast positioning, PATCH debounce, custom cursors, TimeBlock sizing, overlap handling
steps: Fix EventPill button nesting - change from <button> to <div role='button' tabIndex={0}>
Move AI toasts from bottom-right to top-right, increase duration to 12s, add slide-in from right animation
Add 500ms debounce to calendar PATCH calls on drag
Add custom cursor styles in globals.css for premium feel
Fix TimeBlock sizing with accurate height calculation and 24px minimum
Handle overlapping events - detect overlaps and display side-by-side with conflict indicators
acceptance_criteria: EventPill uses div role=button instead of button to fix hydration error
AIToast is positioned top-right with 12s auto-dismiss and slide-in from right
Calendar PATCH calls are debounced by 500ms
All interactive elements have proper cursor states (pointer on buttons/links, grab on draggable)
Overlapping events display side-by-side with warning indicators
Frontend build passes with no errors
findings: dnd-kit useDraggable attributes include role=button and tabIndex=0, so explicit role/tabIndex on the TimeBlock div causes duplicate prop TS errors. Resolved by letting attributes provide those props. EmptyState import was already unused in original code but does not cause build failure. Build passes with all 10 routes generating. Lint passes with zero warnings.
